name: Salesloft
description: Monitor Salesloft sales engagement platform for team access and communication compliance

config.setupInstructions:
1. Log in to Salesloft at https://app.salesloft.com
2. Go to your Profile → API Keys
3. Create a new API key
4. Enter it below

credentialFields.label: API Key
credentialFields.helpText: Found in Salesloft Profile → API Keys

checks.name: Employee Access
checks.description: Reviews Salesloft users with access to the sales platform

checks.name: Monitoring & Alerting
checks.description: Verifies Salesloft cadence activity is tracked for compliance
